meaning: n.缝,狭槽,位置,水沟,细长的孔,硬币投币口,狭通道,足迹vt.开槽于,跟踪
examples: Somebody else can take your slot.
He dropped a coin into the slot and dialled.
He has a regular slot on the late-night programme.
Olympia Snowe of Maine, may be giving up the top slot to Sen.
Paul Gambaccini and a documentary strand will take the Saturday night slot vacated by Russell Brand.
